acceptedFindings.explanation: Token receive/fallback are payable only to reject native ETH with a custom error. No native ETH custody is intended.
Vault receive/fallback are payable only to reject native ETH with a custom error. No native ETH custody is intended.
Vesting math intentionally uses block.timestamp for cliff and linear vesting. Boundary tests and invariant tests cover expected semantics.
Strict equality against zero is used to reject zero releasable amount. This is an explicit API behavior, not authorization logic.
